---
title: "20260224 Data Wrangling Yeonu"
author: "Yeonu"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## 

## Sorting Data

### load packages

```{r}
library(tidyverse) 
library(brms)  
library(ggeffects) 
library(readxl)
```

### read in data

```{r}
df1 <- read_excel("1_29Kangaroo Rat Data_TableToExcel.xlsx")  
df2 <- read_excel("1_29Small_Mammal_Observations_TableToExcel.xlsx") 
```

### cleaning

```{r}
### STEP 1. Filter for Di
df2_Difiltered <- df2 %>%
  #filter for DI, Di, dI, di
  filter(tolower(genus) == "di")

### STEP 2. Extract head widths. Distinguish pm and b
df2_head_mb_cleaned <- df2_Difiltered %>%
  mutate(
    # Extract all numeric values and labels (pm, b) in their appearing order
    all_nums = str_extract_all(KRAT_Head_Width_mm, "[0-9.]+"),
    all_labels = str_extract_all(str_to_lower(KRAT_Head_Width_mm), "pm|b"),
    
    # Map the first and second extracted elements to temporary variables
    num1 = sapply(all_nums, function(x) as.numeric(x[1])),
    num2 = sapply(all_nums, function(x) as.numeric(x[2])),
    lab1 = sapply(all_labels, function(x) x[1]),
    lab2 = sapply(all_labels, function(x) x[2])
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    # Rule: Assign num1/num2 to Maxillary or Bolea based on the order of lab1/lab2
    # If no label exists, num1 defaults to Maxillary_Head_Width
    Maxillary_Head_Width = case_when(
      is.na(lab1) ~ num1,
      lab1 == "pm" ~ num1,
      lab2 == "pm" ~ num2,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    Bolea_Head_Width = case_when(
      lab1 == "b" ~ num1,
      lab2 == "b" ~ num2,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )

### STEP 3: rename df2 to merge with df1 later
df2_renametodf1 <- df2_head_mb_cleaned %>%
  rename(
    Notes = KRAT_Notes,
    Toe_Length = KRAT_Hind_Toe_Length,
    Hind_Limb_Length = KRAT_Hind_Limb_Length,
    Foot_Width = KRAT_Foot_Width_mm,
    Foot_Length = KRAT_Foot_Length_mm,
    Hand_Width = KRAT_Hand_Width_mm,
    Finger_Length = KRAT_Finger_Length,
    Wrist_Width = KRAT_Wrist_Width_mm,
    Head_Length = KRAT_Head_Length_mm,
    Tag = Tag_Number,
    Weight_Animal_Only = Animal_Weight_g,
    LOC = location_code,
    Ear_Length_Notch = Ear_mm,
    Tail_Length = Tail_mm,
    Body_Length = Body_mm,
    Genus = genus
  ) %>%
  # Remove irrelevant or temporary columns (teeth: No records, Head width-: changed to other columns)
  select(-KRAT_Teeth, -KRAT_Head_Width_mm, -all_nums, -all_labels, -num1, -num2, -lab1, -lab2)

### STEP 4: Merge df1 and df2
# Data type change to numeric
df1_numeric <- df1 %>%
  select(-Teeth) %>%
  mutate(across(c(Bolea_Head_Width, Maxillary_Head_Width, Toe_Length, Hind_Limb_Length), as.numeric))

df2_numeric <- df2_renametodf1 %>%
  mutate(across(c(Bolea_Head_Width, Maxillary_Head_Width, Toe_Length, Hind_Limb_Length), as.numeric))

# Bind them together
final_krat_data <- bind_rows(df1_numeric, df2_numeric)

### STEP 5: Species assignment & Type Conversion
final_krat_data <- final_krat_data %>%
  # 1. Assign Species name based on Location (LOC) column
  mutate(Species = case_when(
    LOC == "Hastings" ~ "Dipodomys venustus",
    LOC == "FONR"     ~ "Dipodomys heermanni", 
    TRUE ~ Species
  )) %>%
  # 2. Ensure all measurement columns are numeric to prevent plotting errors
  mutate(across(c(contains("Length"), contains("Width"), contains("Weight")), as.numeric))
```

###
